prose:
Method–provenance summary:
Property: Fukui f+ (electrophilic) value on the most electrophilic atom of nitrobenzene (atom 4, C).
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier “standard”), no density fitting (exact four-center integrals) in PySCF 2.x, gas phase.
Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on the user-supplied geometry /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz; no additional optimisation (DFT//input-XYZ).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Convergence & caveats: SCF and N±1 calculations all reported "ok" status. The integrity block marks the run as trustworthy. All charge-conservation checks passed (Σf⁺ = Σf⁻ = 1.0000). Warnings reproduced verbatim below.

Headline result
Most electrophilic site (C4) condensed Fukui function f⁺ = 0.49641782 (dimensionless).

Reproducibility
CLI invocation (see JSON):
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpxlbtprg8/live.json
